channel.title: Compliance on Anatole HAGBE | DevOps & Cloud Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Compliance on Anatole HAGBE | DevOps & Cloud Engineer

item.title: Terraform AWS Baseline
item.author: ahagbes89@gmail.com (Anatole HAGBE)
item.description:
An open-source Terraform module set that bootstraps a secure AWS multi-account organization from scratch, following AWS Well-Architected Framework guidelines.

Modules Included

  • Organization — AWS Organizations + SSO setup
  • Networking — VPC, subnets, Transit Gateway, VPN
  • Security — GuardDuty, Security Hub, Config, CloudTrail
  • IAM — Permission sets, SCPs, IAM Identity Center
  • Logging — Centralized log archive account
  • Monitoring — CloudWatch alarms + SNS baseline

Tech Stack

Terraform AWS Python GitHub Actions Terratest
